pi_items.source: Web search confirmed Chinook database is a real, public sample database created by Luis Rocha. Media data is based on real iTunes Library data. Available on GitHub and other sources.

privileged_info_summary: The Chinook Database Reconciliation task uses the real, public Chinook sample database (media store data based on iTunes Library). The task creates two SQLite databases: an unchanged snapshot (59 customers, 412 invoices) and a modified production version with 4 controlled changes: 3 new customers added (IDs 60-62), 5 invoices deleted (IDs 10,20,30,40,50), 10 tracks with prices increased by $1.00 each (TrackIds 100-109 from $0.99 to $1.99), and 2 customers with updated countries (CustomerIds 5 and 10). Expected reconciliation counts are: new_customers=3, deleted_invoices=5, price_changes=10, country_changes=2. The production database is at /home/ga/Documents/databases/chinook_prod.db and snapshot at /home/ga/Documents/databases/chinook_snapshot.db. Task requires DBeaver connection named 'ChinookProd', SQL queries saved to /home/ga/Documents/scripts/reconciliation.sql, and CSV report to /home/ga/Documents/exports/reconciliation_report.csv with columns: ChangeCategory, TableName, RecordsAffected, Direction, Details.
